mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, mechanically lifting equity valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid deterioration in the unemployment rate signals an approaching economic contraction, prompting risk-off positioning and equity deleveraging that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the rising unemployment signal, or the signal's predictive power vanishes after controlling for FEDFUNDS changes.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent strength in housing starts and nonfarm payrolls confirms robust aggregate demand expansion, which lifts corporate revenue expectations and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform a single-proxy baseline in out-of-sample testing, or forward returns turn negative when both series rise simultaneously.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production exceeding its historical trend indicates supply-side resilience that offsets demand shocks, supporting corporate margins and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over a one-week horizon.
failure_condition: Rank IC drops below 0.02 when INDPRO crosses the threshold during rate hikes, or forward returns are indistinguishable from random walk benchmarks.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth accelerating above trend reflects broad-based economic expansion, which historically correlates with rising equity risk premiums and positive S&P 500 forward returns over a monthly horizon.
failure_condition: Forward returns show no statistical difference between above-trend and below-trend GDP quarters, or the signal's directional accuracy falls below 50% in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation erodes real purchasing power and forces central bank tightening, which compresses equity multiples and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive or neutral when inflation exceeds the threshold, or the signal's predictive power disappears after adjusting for FEDFUNDS trajectory.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous job growth and declining unemployment confirm labor market tightness that fuels wage-driven consumption, supporting earnings revisions and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over a monthly horizon.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields a negative or zero Rank IC, or forward returns are lower when both series move favorably compared to periods of labor market stagnation.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp contraction in retail sales volume signals weakening consumer spending, which directly reduces corporate top-line guidance and triggers negative S&P 500 forward returns over a one-week horizon.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are positive or statistically indistinguishable from zero following the sales contraction trigger, or the signal fails to predict returns in a rolling 3-year window.
